_comment: CPG brand directory for programmatic SEO. Each entry generates /brand/<slug>. Categories must match keys in content/categories.json. Domains are the canonical brand site without www or trailing slash. Add brands here, regenerate by deploying — no code changes needed.

brands.name: Casper
brands.blurb: Direct-to-consumer mattress brand that helped pioneer the bed-in-a-box category.

brands.name: Purple
brands.blurb: Hyper-elastic polymer mattresses known for the grid technology and cooling profile.

brands.name: Saatva
brands.blurb: Premium online mattress brand focused on luxury innerspring construction.

brands.name: Tuft & Needle
brands.blurb: Budget-friendly DTC mattress brand acquired by Serta Simmons.

brands.name: Leesa
brands.blurb: Online mattress brand with a social impact program donating mattresses to shelters.

brands.name: Helix Sleep
brands.blurb: Personalized mattress brand with a quiz-driven recommendation engine for firmness.

brands.name: Avocado Green Mattress
brands.blurb: Organic certified latex and wool mattress brand with a strong sustainability story.

brands.name: Nectar Sleep
brands.blurb: Value-priced memory foam mattress brand owned by Resident Home.

brands.name: Bear Mattress
brands.blurb: Athletic-recovery-positioned mattress brand using Celliant fiber technology.

brands.name: DreamCloud
brands.blurb: Hybrid luxury mattress brand from Resident Home with a long-trial guarantee.

brands.name: Layla Sleep
brands.blurb: Flippable mattress brand with two firmness levels in a single bed.

brands.name: Tempur-Pedic
brands.blurb: NASA-derived memory foam mattress brand and one of the original premium category leaders.

brands.name: Stearns & Foster
brands.blurb: Heritage luxury innerspring mattress brand owned by Tempur Sealy International.

brands.name: Brooklyn Bedding
brands.blurb: American-made mattress brand that also produces private-label beds for other DTC players.

brands.name: Awara Sleep
brands.blurb: Latex hybrid mattress brand emphasizing natural materials at a value price.

brands.name: Glossier
brands.blurb: DTC beauty brand built out of Into the Gloss with a cult millennial following.

brands.name: The Ordinary
brands.blurb: Ingredient-led affordable skincare brand from Deciem with viral active formulations.

brands.name: Drunk Elephant
brands.blurb: Clean clinical skincare brand known for the suspicious six ingredient exclusion list.

brands.name: Rare Beauty
brands.blurb: Selena Gomez's makeup brand with a heavy focus on inclusive shade range.

brands.name: Ilia Beauty
brands.blurb: Clean beauty brand known for tinted serums and skin-first makeup formulations.

brands.name: Fenty Beauty
brands.blurb: Rihanna's makeup brand that redefined inclusive shade ranges across the industry.

brands.name: Kosas
brands.blurb: Clean cosmetics brand bridging the gap between skincare and makeup.

brands.name: Youth to the People
brands.blurb: Superfood-positioned skincare brand acquired by L'Oreal in 2024.

brands.name: Tatcha
brands.blurb: Japanese-inspired luxury skincare brand acquired by Unilever.

brands.name: Merit Beauty
brands.blurb: Minimalist clean beauty brand known for the Five Minute Face approach.

brands.name: Olive & June
brands.blurb: DTC nail care brand that built a manicure system for at-home use.

brands.name: Saie Beauty
brands.blurb: Clean beauty brand with a strong sustainability and ingredient transparency story, known for refillable packaging.

brands.name: Summer Fridays
brands.blurb: Influencer-founded skincare brand viral for the Jet Lag mask.

brands.name: Paula's Choice
brands.blurb: Evidence-based skincare brand built around ingredient education and chemical exfoliants.

brands.name: Supergoop
brands.blurb: Sunscreen-first skincare brand making SPF a daily ritual rather than a beach product.

brands.name: The Farmer's Dog
brands.blurb: DTC fresh dog food subscription delivered in pre-portioned meal packs.

brands.name: Ollie
brands.blurb: Fresh dog food subscription competing with The Farmer's Dog on personalized recipes.

brands.name: Chewy
brands.blurb: Online pet products retailer with autoship subscriptions and a notable customer service reputation.

brands.name: KONG
brands.blurb: Iconic dog toy brand known for the rubber Classic and treat-stuffable designs.

brands.name: Open Farm
brands.blurb: Premium humanely-raised pet food brand with a transparent supply chain.

brands.name: Stella & Chewy's
brands.blurb: Raw and freeze-dried pet food brand emphasizing minimally-processed nutrition.

brands.name: Wild Earth
brands.blurb: Plant-based dog food brand backed by Mark Cuban with a sustainability positioning.

brands.name: Spot & Tango
brands.blurb: Fresh and dehydrated dog food subscription with personalized portioning.

brands.name: Smalls
brands.blurb: Premium fresh cat food brand built specifically for cats, not dog-food spin-offs.

brands.name: BarkBox
brands.blurb: Monthly subscription box of dog toys and treats from Bark, the dog-first company.

brands.name: Petco
brands.blurb: National pet retail chain offering products, vet services, and grooming.

brands.name: Blue Buffalo
brands.blurb: Premium dry pet food brand owned by General Mills with a natural-ingredients positioning.

brands.name: Wellness Pet Food
brands.blurb: Natural pet food brand with a heritage in holistic recipe formulation.

brands.name: Fromm Family Pet Food
brands.blurb: Family-owned premium pet food brand known among breeders and serious dog owners.

brands.name: Oreo
brands.blurb: America's best-selling cookie brand owned by Mondelez International.

brands.name: Lay's
brands.blurb: Frito-Lay's flagship potato chip brand with the largest chip portfolio in the US.

brands.name: Sugarfina
brands.blurb: Boutique candy company known for cocktail-themed gummies and curated tasting sets.

brands.name: RXBAR
brands.blurb: Whole-food protein bar brand acquired by Kellogg with the no-bs ingredient labeling.

brands.name: KIND
brands.blurb: Healthy snack bar brand built on a foundation of whole nuts and minimal processing.

brands.name: Magic Spoon
brands.blurb: High-protein low-sugar cereal brand DTC-only with influencer marketing roots.

brands.name: Siete Foods
brands.blurb: Grain-free Mexican-American food brand including chips, tortillas, and sauces. Acquired by PepsiCo.

brands.name: SkinnyPop
brands.blurb: Ready-to-eat popcorn brand emphasizing simple-ingredient positioning.

brands.name: Perfect Bar
brands.blurb: Refrigerated peanut-butter-based protein bar with a fresh-foods positioning.

brands.name: HARIBO
brands.blurb: German gummy candy brand famous for Goldbears, sold globally.

brands.name: Milk Bar
brands.blurb: Christina Tosi's cult dessert brand known for compost cookies and birthday cake truffles.

brands.name: Graza
brands.blurb: Single-origin olive oil brand with a viral design-led squeeze bottle approach.

brands.name: Chomps
brands.blurb: Meat snack sticks brand emphasizing clean ingredients and Whole30 compatibility.

brands.name: Fly By Jing
brands.blurb: Sichuan-inspired pantry brand best known for Sichuan Chili Crisp.

brands.name: Liquid Death
brands.blurb: Tallboy canned mountain water brand with a punk-rock marketing identity.

brands.name: Olipop
brands.blurb: Functional prebiotic soda brand using classic flavors with a gut-health angle.

brands.name: Poppi
brands.blurb: Apple-cider-vinegar-based prebiotic soda brand acquired by PepsiCo.

brands.name: Athletic Brewing
brands.blurb: Non-alcoholic craft beer brand leading the NA category in the US.

brands.name: Death Wish Coffee
brands.blurb: Self-described world's strongest coffee brand sold direct and on Amazon.

brands.name: Celsius
brands.blurb: Functional energy drink brand with a fitness positioning, partnered with PepsiCo for distribution.

brands.name: Health-Ade
brands.blurb: Premium kombucha brand made with raw fermentation and small-batch positioning.

brands.name: Spindrift

brands.blurb: Sparkling water brand emphasizing natural fruit flavor profiles.

brands.name: Guayakí Yerba Mate
brands.blurb: Yerba mate brand bringing the South American beverage to the US market.

brands.blurb: Lifestyle sports nutrition and energy drink brand with bold flavor partnerships.

brands.blurb: Plant-based household cleaning products with a design-forward bottle aesthetic.

brands.name: Mrs. Meyer's
brands.blurb: Garden-inspired cleaning products owned by SC Johnson, sold widely in grocery.

brands.name: Blueland
brands.blurb: Refillable cleaning tablets brand reducing single-use plastic in the home.

brands.blurb: Plant-based cleaning and paper products with a Unilever parent and a strong sustainability story.

brands.name: Branch Basics
brands.blurb: One concentrate, dilute-to-clean brand championing simplified non-toxic cleaning.

brands.name: Grove Collaborative
brands.blurb: DTC eco-friendly household brand offering subscription delivery of cleaning and personal care goods.

brands.name: ECOS
brands.blurb: Family-owned plant-powered cleaning brand with TRUE Zero Waste manufacturing facilities.

brands.name: Puracy

brands.name: Tru Earth

brands.name: Molly's Suds

brands.name: Common Good
brands.blurb: Refillable household cleaner brand sold in 1-gallon refill jugs at retail.

brands.name: Dove

brands.name: Dr. Bronner's

brands.blurb: Men's wellness DTC brand covering hair loss, skin, sexual health, and mental health.

brands.name: Billie
brands.blurb: Women's razor and body care DTC brand acquired by Edgewell.

brands.blurb: Men's razor and grooming DTC brand with strong UK and US presence.

brands.blurb: Procter & Gamble's iconic men's personal care brand revitalized by viral marketing.

brands.blurb: Elevated body care brand with skincare-grade ingredients and minimalist design.

brands.name: Dr. Squatch
